name: sim_L12_geometry_negatives_triad
description: L12 negatives-on-geometry triad: torus scrambled, no chirality, loop swap. Each negative must exclude a distinguishability property that the positive shell-local geometry carries.

pytorch.reason: pytorch not required for L12 triad: numpy baseline suffices for stratification/chirality/loop-swap distinguishability; z3 carries the load-bearing structural check.

pyg.reason: pyg not required for L12 triad: numpy baseline suffices for stratification/chirality/loop-swap distinguishability; z3 carries the load-bearing structural check.

z3.reason: z3 UNSAT-proves loop-swap involution (structural negation of L12 swap ban-breaker); load-bearing for boundary test.
